data.agent_notes: Monitoring agent deferred - can be created on demand via 'n5 survey' commands

handoff_notes: Integration complete. SMS handler tested and working (list, status commands verified). Webhook auto-trigger was enabled in earlier debugging session. User rule created for 'n5 survey' SMS commands. 30-day monitoring agent NOT created - recommend creating on-demand when V wants ongoing tracking for a specific form rather than blanket monitoring.
